title: Julio Rodriguez Exits Game with Apparent Injury
description: Recent reports indicate that Julio Rodriguez left a Mariners game due to an apparent injury, sparking search interest.

sources.title: Julio Rodríguez exits Mariners game with apparent injury
Julio Rodriguez exits game vs. Reds
Mariners' Julio Rodriguez: Pulled from Monday's matchup

sections.heading: Injury Reports
paragraphs: According to The Seattle Times, Julio Rodríguez exited a Mariners game with an apparent injury. CBS Sports also reported that the Mariners' Julio Rodriguez was pulled from Monday's matchup.

sections.heading: Game Details
paragraphs: There are varying reports regarding the opponent in the game. MLB.com reported that Julio Rodriguez exited a game versus the Reds. Conversely, The Seattle Times reported the game was against the San Francisco Giants.

sections.heading: Search Interest
paragraphs: Google Trends data shows a search volume lower bound of 500 for the term 'julio rodriguez' in the US region. The trend feed was published on July 20, 2026.

faq.a: According to The Seattle Times and CBS Sports, he is trending because he exited a game with an apparent injury.
The Seattle Times, MLB.com, and CBS Sports all published reports regarding Julio Rodriguez exiting a game.
